textPlain: I see they just decided to become even more useless than they already are.Except for the ransomware thing, or phishing mail writing, most of the uses listed there seems legit to me and a strong reason to pay for AI.One of these is exactly preparing with mock interviews which is something I myself do a lot, or having step by step instructions to implement things for my personal projects that are not even public facing and that I can't be arsed to learn because it's not my job.Long life to Local LLMs I guess

Anthropic has already started enshittifying Claude Code. Just in the last week, as far as I’ve noticed, they’ve stopped showing tokens consumed, they changed the UI for percent until compaction. Why?The people who love and use a piece of software like this will notice this, and get frustrated.I liked to see how many tokens a prompt query consumed. It gave me an intuitive sense for when I was driving the agent into rabbit holes.Really fucking annoying, but I shouldn’t have expected anything else from big “not open source, not open model”
